title: Shengong Hu
content:
Shengong Hu
 is a member of the 
Shengong Family
 of the four Great Families of the 
Southern Domain
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
. He, alongside 
Tang Yanfeng
 and 
Zhan Konglie
, is known as Southern Domain's Three Calamities.

Background
[
]

He is one of the most talented cultivators of his generation as he managed to reach the peak of 
Corporeal Yang
 in a mere millennia. He was also the first person in his generation to become a messenger of the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
.

In the past, he only managed to last 15 seconds in the Thunder Celestial Temple's Trial Earth.

History
[
]

He met 
Wang Lin
 inside the thunder pond in the Southern Domain of the Allheaven Star System. As Wang Lin had just looked past the door inside the heaven-defying bead, he mistook Wang Lin for a Third Step Cultivator and acknowledged him as his Lord. This led him to being isolated by his family and the Thunder Celestial Temple.

He was saved by Wang Lin from the mad 
Qing Shui
 inside the 
Thunder Celestial Realm
.

He met Wang Lin during the qualifiers for the Celestial Bestowment Tournament. By this point, he had learnt that Wang Lin was not a Third Step Cultivator. Although he was no longer fanatic about Wang Lin, he still respected him greatly. He vouched for Wang Lin during the tournament.
